full_text:
Liu Xian 劉賢
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xian (劉賢). Liu Du’s son. Defended Lingling with Xing Daorong against Liu Bei, but failed. Liu Xian was affiliated with Liu Du and the Shu Kingdom.
